Stub functions for initializing, managing, and configuring a progress window in tests.

# Purpose
This C source code file provides a set of functions to manage a `ProgressWindow` user interface component. The functions include initialization and deinitialization (`progress_window_init` and `progress_window_deinit`), creation and destruction ([`progress_window_create`](<#progress_window_create>) and `progress_window_destroy`), and operations to manipulate the window within a window stack (`progress_window_push`, `app_progress_window_push`, and `progress_window_pop`). The code also includes functions to set the progress and result status of the `ProgressWindow`, such as `progress_window_set_max_fake_progress`, `progress_window_set_progress`, `progress_window_set_result_success`, and `progress_window_set_result_failure`. Additionally, it allows setting callbacks and disabling the back button functionality with `progress_window_set_callbacks` and `progress_window_set_back_disabled`. The file includes a header file `applib/ui/progress_window.h`, which likely contains the necessary type definitions and declarations for these functions.
